---
title: "Reporting"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Mission (Field) Reports

Mission Reports can be saved to the 📂supplement/missionReports folder

Pilot Logs can be saved to the 📂supplement/pilotLogs folder

If there are any other field reports, please save to the 📂supplement/
folder (if multiple, then provide a relevant subfolder).

## Vendor Reports

Alseamar Technical Report and Alseamar Acoustic real-time report are
saved in the 📂supplement/ folder of this repository.

## Final Report

*Stay Tuned!*
